onboarding.title:
Your Pet's
Digital Passport
onboarding.subtitle: Keep vaccinations, reminders, and health records in one place.
onboarding.legal_prefix: By continuing, you agree to our
onboarding.terms_agree: I agree to the Terms and Privacy Policy
onboarding.terms_body:
Welcome to Petto. This is temporary placeholder text for our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.

By using Petto, you agree to store pet health information you choose to add, including vaccinations, reminders, and medical records.

We process your email address for passwordless sign-in and may send verification codes. We do not sell your personal data.

You can request deletion of your account and data by contacting support. Content in this app is for your personal pet-care records and is not a substitute for professional veterinary advice.

These terms may be updated before launch. Continued use after updates means you accept the revised terms.

auth.code_resent: A new code was sent. Previous codes no longer work.
auth.email_subtitle: We'll send you a one-time code to sign in.
